title: Minimalist Rowboat at Sunrise
prompt: a small wooden rowboat gently floating on a calm, glassy lake at sunrise, tethered loosely to the shore, soft ripples forming around its reflection, the water glowing with hues of baby blue and pale pink, pastel sky blending seamlessly with the horizon, delicate clouds scattered lightly above, the rocky shoreline visible beneath the clear shallows, a quiet, dreamlike atmosphere filled with stillness and solitude, perfectly composed in minimalist style, cinematic and painterly, inspired by fine art photography and Japanese ambient aesthetics, evokes peace, simplicity, and gentle longing --chaos 20 --ar 3:4 --v 7 --stylize 850 --profile sg2il8x
